spec_match.rationale: The builder now emits `min` / `max` / `ideal` / `exact` qualified MediaTrackConstraints plus `video.advanced[]` branches inside the `<script type="permissionconstraints">` child.

interactive.rationale: Track toggles, qualifier dropdowns, advanced fallback rows, copy buttons, a native `<usermedia>` preview when supported, and a `getUserMedia()` probe all update from the same constraint object.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page still delivers the promised configurable form, generated `<usermedia>` HTML, and equivalent `getUserMedia()` call.

edge_cases.rationale: Advanced constraints, exact/range qualifiers, generated JSON validation, unsupported `<usermedia>` fallback, request failures, and negotiated `track.getSettings()` output are all surfaced.

design_system.rationale: New controls and readouts use existing CSS variables and pair button background overrides with text colors.

summary: Resolved: the builder covers qualified and advanced MediaTrackConstraints, hosts a live `<usermedia>` preview where available, probes the equivalent JS request with negotiated settings, validates the generated JSON, and includes the ChromeStatus self-heal link.
